name: Email Triage
description: Intelligent inbox management, prioritization, and response drafting

content.title: Email Triage & Prioritization
content.content:
# Email Triage & Prioritization

AI-powered email management transforms overflowing inboxes into organized, prioritized work queues.

## The Challenge

Business inboxes receive hundreds of emails daily:
- Client requests buried among newsletters
- Urgent matters mixed with routine updates
- Critical attachments overlooked
- Response deadlines missed

## AI-Powered Solution

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Email as Incoming Email
    participant AI as AI Agent
    participant Queue as Work Queue
    participant User as User

    Email->>AI: New email arrives
    AI->>AI: Analyze sender, subject, content
    AI->>AI: Classify type & urgency
    AI->>AI: Extract key information
    AI->>Queue: Add to prioritized queue
    AI->>User: Draft response (if appropriate)
    User->>User: Review and approve
```

## Key Capabilities

| Capability | Description |
|------------|-------------|
| **Sender Recognition** | Identify known clients, partners, internal teams |
| **Content Classification** | Categorize: inquiry, complaint, request, notification |
| **Urgency Detection** | Identify time-sensitive keywords and deadlines |
| **Response Drafting** | Generate draft replies for common scenarios |
| **Attachment Processing** | Extract and classify attached documents |

## Prioritization Logic

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[New Email] --> B{Known Sender?}
    B -->|Yes| C{VIP Client?}
    B -->|No| D[Standard Priority]
    C -->|Yes| E[High Priority]
    C -->|No| F{Urgency Keywords?}
    F -->|Yes| E
    F -->|No| D
    E --> G[Immediate Queue]
    D --> H[Standard Queue]
```

## Benefits

- **Focus**: Work on what matters most first
- **Speed**: Faster response times for critical items
- **Consistency**: Same prioritization rules applied to all emails
- **Visibility**: Clear view of pending work across the team
